installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.18.2 --activate && cd apps/web && pnpm install --ignore-workspace --ignore-scripts
buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.18.2 --activate && cd apps/web && ./node_modules/.bin/convex deploy --cmd 'node ./scripts/generate-fitl-graph.mjs && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -b && ./node_modules/.bin/vite build'
